title: OPHELIA'S PLACE - 211info
text: OPHELIA'S PLACE OPHELIA'S PLACE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps girls make healthy life choices through empowerment, education, and support. Provides on-site after-school programs and individual, family, and group therapy. Also provides services in schools, including classroom presentations, girl support groups, and staff training in the areas of healthy relationships, bullying and harassment, healthy body image, and digital safety. Offers professional development training for people-serving organizations, nonprofits, and businesses. 1577 Pearl Street Suite 100 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Ages 10-18 who identify as female Hours: By appointment: Monday-Thursday 10am-6pm After School Drop-in hours: Monday-Thursday 3pm-6pm Email (541) 284-4333 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 284-4333 Main phone Main phone (541) 284-4333 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Orientation required for most services. Call for appointment. FEES: None for intake or drop-in. Fees vary for counseling and workshops. Some scholarships available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation available except for therapeutic services AREA SERVED: Lane and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 3pm-6pm Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Family Support Centers/Outreach Leadership Development Youth Centers Youth Enrichment Programs Youth/Student Support Groups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
